commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] No narrow automated repair remains; maintainers need to accept the compatibility-sensitive update.run response change and managed-service lifecycle risk before merge.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found; the diff reuses existing update handoff/service-control code and adds no dependencies, workflows, lockfile changes, or new secret handling. (sha=50bafd3fc2fe62708bbed8c09259b62b9b62debf)
commands.review_summary:
The PR routes supervised git-source Gateway `update.run` calls through the managed-service handoff path, expands CLI stop/restart handling to git updates, and updates focused tests and docs.

PR surface: Source +53, Tests +140, Docs +6. Total +199 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and v2026.6.1 route git installs through the live `runGatewayUpdate` path while package-manager installs use managed handoff. I did not independently reproduce the transient module-resolution failure in a live current-main service.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automated repair remains; maintainers need to accept the compatibility-sensitive `update.run` response change and managed-service lifecycle risk before merge.

target.title: fix: hand off supervised git updates
target.body:
## Summary
- Route supervised git-source `update.run` calls through the detached update handoff path.
- Keep unsupervised/dev git update calls on the existing in-process path.
- Add regression coverage for supervised git handoff behavior.
- Align update docs with supervised git handoff behavior.

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior addressed**: a supervised git-source gateway could rebuild `dist/` while the live gateway was still serving RPCs, creating a transient stale-artifact window. A previous self-update lab run observed a transient module-resolution failure during that live rebuild window.
- **Real environment tested**: CrabBox GCP disposable VM (`cbx_4e5f6399ffa8`) from a fresh PR checkout at `50bafd3fc2fe62708bbed8c09259b62b9b62debf`, using an isolated user-systemd gateway, isolated OpenClaw profile/state/config, and an isolated loopback port. The production fleet gateway was not changed.
- **Exact command run after this patch**:
  ```sh
  crabbox run --provider gcp --type e2-standard-8 --fresh-pr openclaw/openclaw#91296 --script-stdin
  ```
- **Script high-level steps**:
  1. Install Node 22.19.0 and pnpm 11.2.2 in the disposable VM.
  2. Run `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` and `pnpm build` from the fresh PR checkout.
  3. Install and start an isolated user-systemd OpenClaw gateway from the PR build.
  4. Verify initial gateway health.
  5. Call `update.run` through the backend Gateway RPC surface.
  6. Wait for the detached helper log, final restart sentinel, service journal stop/start, and post-update health.
  7. Stop the isolated gateway and release the disposable lease.
- **Evidence after fix**:
  ```text
  update.run: status=skipped mode=git reason=managed-service-handoff-started
  handoff: status=started command="openclaw update --yes --channel dev --timeout 1800"
  restart: ok=true signal=SIGUSR1 reason=update.run
  helper: started command=true, child pid logged=true, exited zero=true, completed after 907s
  service journal: stop observed=true, start observed=true
  health: before=true, after=true
  final sentinel: kind=update status=ok version=2026.6.2
  final sentinel after.sha=b8adc11977ab9dc1eb558dc070bfe63df75911c5
  lease cleanup: stopped=true
  ```
- **Final update steps recorded in the sentinel**:
  ```text
  clean check
  git checkout main
  git fetch
  upstream check
  git rev-parse @{upstream}
  git rev-list
  preflight worktree
  preflight checkout (b8adc119)
  preflight deps install (b8adc119)
  preflight build (b8adc119)
  preflight cleanup
  git rebase
  deps install
  build
  ui:build
  openclaw doctor
  git rev-parse HEAD (after)
  ```
- **Observed result after fix**: the supervised git-source `update.run` request did not rebuild the live gateway process in-place. It returned the managed handoff result, wrote the handoff sentinel, signaled the isolated service for restart, then the detached helper completed the git update, dependency install, build, UI build, doctor check, service restart, and health verification.
- **What was not tested**: native LLM agent turn and live Discord transport delivery. This proof covers Gateway RPC plus the managed-service lifecycle in an isolated service.

## Tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/server-methods/update.test.ts`
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/tools/gateway-tool.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm build`
- `git diff --check`
- `crabbox run --provider gcp --type e2-standard-8 --fresh-pr openclaw/openclaw#91296 --script-stdin`

## Dependency changes
None. Dependency-file scan against `origin/main` returned no files.

## AI-assisted
AI-assisted. I understand the change: supervised git-source updates now use the existing detached update handoff mechanism so the live gateway does not mutate its own built `dist` tree while handling the update RPC. Local Codex review was attempted but blocked by local Codex CLI auth returning `401 Unauthorized`.
target.author: abnershang

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
